title: branch — helper functions
description: Three published helpers for common branch lookups from any layer (controller, action, listener, blade template, Artisan command).

helpers.purpose: Returns the Branch resolved by the `branch.resolve_active` middleware for THIS request. Null when no active branch could be resolved (typical for read-only pages that don't scope by branch).
behaviours: Reads from the `RequestContext.branch_id` slot the middleware writes.
Eager-loads `organization + region` in a single query when the accessor is first hit (via a per-request memoized lookup).
Never queries the DB when the middleware short-circuits (no `X-Branch-Id` + no default) — returns null.

helpers.purpose: Returns the active-branch ULID without hydrating the model. Faster than `active_branch()->id` because it avoids the eager-load of Organization + Region.

Compute is-open-now for a branch. Accepts a Branch model, a ULID, OR a slug. Handles the timezone conversion via branch.region.timezone. Respects opening_hours, exceptions, and status (paused = closed for is-open purposes; closed status = closed).
behaviours: Loads the branch when passed an id string (SELECT includes region for the tz).
helpers.flow: 1) Resolve Branch. 2) When status IN (paused, closed), return false. 3) Convert $moment to branch.region.timezone. 4) Check exceptions — if the date has an exception with `closed: true`, return false; with `hours: [...]`, use those periods. 5) Otherwise use opening_hours[day-of-week]. 6) For each period, return true when $moment falls in [open, close). 7) Otherwise false.

notes: Every helper is a thin wrapper. Prefer container-injected services (`BranchRepository`, `OpeningHoursEvaluator`, `DefaultBranchResolver`) for anything more complex.
`branch_is_open_now()` respects both `opening_hours` AND `status` — a paused or closed Branch always returns false regardless of the schedule.

examples.title: Read the active branch in a controller
examples.code:
$branch = active_branch();
if ($branch === null) throw new NoActiveBranchException();

examples.title: Guard a booking submission with is-open check
Blade — surface is-open badge in a template
